items.title: I’ve gone from annoyed to agitated when it comes to the general public putting their faith in these predatory “prediction markets” regarding what LeBron James is going to do. They are making it up as they go and conning you. Why do you think every rumored team has led the odds?

items.body_excerpt: Draymond on the viral video of Kevin Hart and him from their golf trip "He was trying to beat Bron and Stoute to the punch of saying what he shot so he hit me '119' just threw it out there and I'm like 'Wooaahhh!'... He was trying to find who he can slot in a spot at the bottom…

items.title: You may not know the name, but if you're a fan of the Commanders, Wizards or New York City FC, you know the voice of public-address announcer Mark Fratto. On Sunday, he'll be the PA announcer for the World Cup final. Story at @theathletic.com (free to read):
items.author: Josh Robbins
items.body_excerpt:
You may not know the name, but if you're a fan of the Commanders, Wizards or New York City FC, you know the voice of public-address announcer Mark Fratto. On Sunday, he'll be the PA announcer for the World Cup final. Story at @theathletic.com (free to read): 
www.nytimes.com/athletic/744...

media.title: Meet Mark Fratto, the World Cup final PA announcer: ‘I’m in the candy aisle of life’ (Gift Article)

items.title: Sunday notes on a Saturday: "A nickel more" creates an era of change for Heat, but at what price? www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/07/18/i... Plus: Herro, Hardaway, Oladipo, Hall of Fame, Giannis, more.
items.author: Ira Winderman
items.body_excerpt: Sunday notes on a Saturday: "A nickel more" creates an era of change for Heat, but at what price? www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/07/18/i... Plus: Herro, Hardaway, Oladipo, Hall of Fame, Giannis, more.

media.title: Ira Winderman: ‘A nickel more’ creates an era of change for Heat, but at what price?
media.description: Typically, the spirit of altruism is an after-the-fact sentiment when it comes to the transactional world of the NBA. But it was different for the Miami Heat with Giannis Antetokounmpo.
